verdict.note: real gateway :8906 (--http): /api/board 233990B→69214B gzip (29.6%), dist JS 860507B→250258B (29.1%), both Content-Encoding:gzip; SSE stream no content-encoding + rename-triggered event arrived 0.26s through the gateway; upstream untouched
real gateway :8907: no-cookie / → 302 login, no-cookie /api → 401 json, cookied /api → 200
real gateway :8907: GET /login renders the styled form; wrong password → NO set-cookie; correct → 302 + signed cookie

env -u SPEXCODE_PASSWORD (first run false-red: shell INHERITED the deploy password — precedence worked as spec'd): startup prints the loud OPEN warning, / and /api/board both 200 uncookied, no login gate
re-measured at HEAD (:8907): /api/board 246778B→71172B gzip (28.8%); SSE stream 0 content-encoding headers; rename event 0.21s through the gateway

Gate boundary itself correct (401/302/login/cookie/WS-gate all as expected) BUT the child backend binds *:PORT — reachable from the LAN with no password, bypassing the gateway entirely. Spec says supervisor+child stay on 127.0.0.1.

Post-fix (child serve() now binds 127.0.0.1): full boundary as specced — 401/302/login-error/httpOnly+Secure per-port cookie/200s with cookie/forged 401/WS destroyed without cookie + 101 with; only the public port is non-loopback, child refused from LAN.

board 434563→126270 (29%), dist JS 898183→262749 (29%), both Content-Encoding: gzip only when accepted; SSE stream carries NO content-encoding and the triggered board-changed arrived ~5.4s after touch = debounce + a 2.4s board rebuild on this loaded box (build-time over budget, not a zlib stall).

Loud OPEN warning at startup + gateway logs 'OPEN (no password)'; unauth GET / → 200 dashboard (not 302), /api/board → 200 JSON, login layer absent (/login falls through to the dashboard, no card, no cookie check). Run with SPEXCODE_PASSWORD unset — an inherited env password correctly gates (env is a designed source).

v0.2.1 gateway (isLoopback announce refactor): unauth /api/board 401, / 302→/login; wrong pw 401; correct pw 302 + Set-Cookie spex_auth_29443 HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Lax; with cookie / 200 + /api/board 200 json; forged cookie 401; WS upgrade no-cookie DESTROYED (no response), with-cookie 101 Switching Protocols; ss: only :29443 external, supervisor 42721 + child 46693 loopback

v0.2.1: startup prints loud OPEN warning; gateway logs 'OPEN (no password)' (announce now keyed on loopback, unchanged for --public); no cookie: / 200 (no redirect), /api/board 200 json; /login is only the SPA fallback serving the dashboard index (no login markers) — login layer absent
